Serving Rochester & Monroe County

Business Insurance for Rochester, NY Companies

Comprehensive business insurance solutions for Rochester employers. From High Tech Corridor startups to University of Rochester contractors, we protect Western New York businesses with workers' comp, commercial auto, liability coverage & employee benefits.

Based 75 miles east in Parish, NY, PCFG Insurance is your veteran-owned agency serving Rochester, Brighton, Henrietta, Greece, Webster, and all of Monroe County.

Rochester Business Facts: Home to over 20,000 businesses, Rochester is Western New York's innovation hub. Major industries include optics/photonics, healthcare (Strong Memorial, Rochester Regional), education, advanced manufacturing, and food/beverage production.

Get Rochester Quote Call (877) 717-7234

Get Your Rochester Business Insurance Quote

Fast quotes for Monroe County businesses

Business Insurance Services for Rochester Employers

From downtown to the suburbs, we provide comprehensive coverage tailored to Western New York businesses.

Workers' Compensation

Required coverage for Rochester businesses with employees. Essential for manufacturing, healthcare, and construction firms.

Learn More →

Commercial Auto

Coverage for business vehicles, service fleets, and company cars navigating Rochester's weather and road conditions.

Learn More →

General Liability

Protection against third-party claims for Rochester retail stores, restaurants, service businesses, and manufacturers.

Learn More →

Employee Benefits

Health, dental, vision, and retirement plans to help Rochester employers compete for top talent in the Western NY job market.

Learn More →

Business Owner's Policy

Bundled coverage for small businesses in Park Avenue, South Wedge, Corn Hill, and throughout Rochester suburbs.

Learn More →

Cyber Liability

Protection from data breaches—critical for Rochester's tech sector, healthcare providers, and financial services firms.

Learn More →

Rochester Industries We Insure

From the High Tech Corridor to the medical campus, we understand Rochester's innovation economy.

Optics & Photonics

High tech companies, imaging firms, laser technology businesses

Healthcare

Strong Memorial, Rochester Regional, private practices, biotech

Education

University of Rochester, RIT, K-12 schools, educational services

Manufacturing

Precision manufacturing, food production, industrial facilities

Technology

Software companies, startups, IT services, data centers

Food & Beverage

Eastman Business Park food companies, breweries, restaurants

Retail

Eastview Mall, Marketplace Mall, local boutiques, shops

Professional Services

Legal, accounting, consulting, engineering, architecture

Rochester's Innovation Economy

From Kodak's legacy to today's photonics revolution, Rochester businesses need insurance partners who understand innovation.

Tech & IP Protection

Coverage for intellectual property, tech E&O, and cyber liability for innovative companies.

Startup-Friendly

Scalable coverage options for growing companies from seed stage to expansion.

Research & Development

Insurance for R&D facilities, labs, and experimental operations.

Why Rochester Businesses Choose PCFG

Veteran-owned expertise meets innovation-friendly coverage for Western New York employers.

Innovation Understanding

We get Rochester's tech ecosystem—from photonics startups to established manufacturers.

15-State Coverage

Perfect for Rochester companies with operations across the Northeast and beyond.

Growth Partnership

We scale with you—from startup to expansion—ensuring you're never underinsured.

Syracuse, NY Watertown, NY Buffalo, NY Albany, NY
